# Retro Document Template

> Load when writing a sprint retrospective.

## Template

```markdown
# Retro: <Sprint Description>

**Date**: YYYY-MM-DD
**Sprint ID**: <id>
**Phases executed**: <list>

## What Shipped

- <feature/fix 1>
- <feature/fix 2>

## Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Files changed | <n> |
| LOC added/removed | +<n>/-<n> |
| Tests added | <n> |
| Implement↔review loops | <n> |
| Total phases | <n> |

## What Went Well (Keep)

- <thing that worked>

## What Didn't Go Well (Stop)

- <thing that caused friction>

## What to Try (Start)

- <experiment or improvement>

## Recurring Patterns

<patterns observed across recent sprints>

## Action Items

- [ ] <concrete action with owner>

## Links

- Plan: [[YYYY-MM-DD_plan_xxx]]
- Review findings: [[link]]
- Related retros: [[link]]
```

## Tags

Add to frontmatter or body: `#retro #sprint-{id} #lessons-learned`
